<p>Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Friday announced a Rs74 reduction in petrol prices and a Rs67 cut in high-speed diesel (HSD) prices as the government seeks to pass on the benefit of declining international oil prices.</p>

news.headline: ‘Game Changer’? Too Soon to Tell. But Ukraine Flexed in Striking Moscow.
news.summary: The drone attack that sent plumes of smoke rising over Moscow intensified Ukrainian hopes of bringing the war to Russia.

news.headline: How armed groups in Colombia are using TikTok to recruit young people
news.summary: As Colombia’s conflict has intensified in recent years, armed groups have flooded social media like TikTok with videos aimed at getting new recruits – particularly young people. The FRANCE 24 Observers team investigated the inner workings of this new recruitment method.

news.headline: Burnham’s Stunning Victory in Makerfield Election May Trigger Starmer’s Last Stand
news.summary: Andy Burnham, a Labour mayor, won a resounding majority in a special election on Thursday, making him eligible to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer for the country’s leadership.

news.headline: FY2026-27: KP CM presents Rs2.17tr budget, with estimated fiscal deficit of Rs48bn
news.summary:
<p>Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister Sohail Afridi on Friday presented the provincial budget for the fiscal year 2026-27. The budget outlay is Rs2.17 trillion, with an estimated fiscal deficit of Rs48 billion, according to the budget documents.</p>

news.headline: Pétanque player, 68, dies after being 'hit in head with metal boule'
news.summary: The man was allegedly struck by his 81-year-old opponent, who has since been arrested, the public prosecutor says.

news.headline: World Cup 2026:  Brazilians race to complete competition's sticker album
news.summary:
It’s not a competition, but the race to complete the sticker album can be just as intense!
 
In #Brazil, collectors from all ages gather to swap stickers, share stories, and chase the dream of a full album. But this year’s edition is bigger, and pricier.From intergenerational bonding to black-market

news.headline: Outrage in Italy after Trump says Meloni 'begged' for photo op
news.summary:

news.headline: Iran floats insurance fees and asserts control over Hormuz
news.summary:
Iran sought to assert control over Strait of Hormuz by saying that ships need its permission and mandatory insurance to cross, even as the US said that 20 ships sailed through overnight via a route it recommends along Oman’s coast.

news.headline: Italy Doesn’t ‘Beg,’ Giorgia Meloni Tells Trump
news.summary: President Trump said the Italian leader had “begged” him to take a photo together at the Group of 7 summit in France. The remarks come as their once-friendly relationship has frayed.
